title: Unveiling the Mysteries of Socotra Island

scenes.text: This island is home to trees that look otherworldly.
This is Socotra, located in Yemen.
Over a third of its plant species are found nowhere else on Earth.
The iconic Dragon's Blood Tree, with its umbrella shape, is a must-see.
scenes.label: ICONIC DRAGON TREE

scenes.text: Follow for a new corner of Earth every day.

description: 📍 Socotra, Yemen. An enchanting island with bizarre trees and unique flora. Follow for daily hidden places! 🌍
